name: Frozen Heart

passives.name: Winter's Caress
passives.effects: {{tip|Cripple|Cripples}} the [[attack speed]] of enemy champions within {{tt|700 units|center to edge}} by 20%.

effects_structured.raw: {{tip Cripple Cripples}} the [[attack speed]] of enemy champions within {{tt 700 units center to edge}} by 20%.

simpleDescription: Massively increases Armor and slows enemy basic attacks

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Winter's Caress is a persistent aura debuff centered on the owner that applies Cripple to enemy champions within 700 units.
Player-visible behavior: enemy champions entering aura range have attack speed reduced by 20% while in range.
